columns.name: channel
columns.description: SLACK | TELEGRAM | WHATSAPP — one config row per messaging channel

columns.name: enabled
columns.description: Include this channel in the scheduled sweep and manual 'send to all'

columns.name: destination
columns.description: Slack channel id (C0123ABC) / Telegram chat id / WhatsApp recipient number

columns.name: inc_top_accounts
columns.description: Append the top overdue accounts by amount

columns.name: freq
columns.description: When the scheduled sweep should send. OFF = manual only.

columns.name: send_hour
columns.description: Hour of day (0-23, server time) for scheduled sends

columns.name: last_sent_at
columns.description: Set by the sweep to avoid double-sending within a window
